type_definitions.name: TypeDefinitionKind
type_definitions.description: Classifies a type-catalogue entry by its structural role. Modified to add FreeFunction variant (D4) for declaring module-public free functions in the catalogue.

type_definitions.name: TypeGraph
type_definitions.description: Pre-indexed view of a crate's public API for type catalogue evaluation. Modified to add functions map (D4) for FreeFunction kind support.

type_definitions.name: TraitImplEntry
type_definitions.description: A trait implementation found on a type, as indexed for TDDD evaluation. Modified to add origin_crate field (D3) for workspace-origin reverse check filtering.

type_definitions.name: TypeBaselineEntry
type_definitions.description: A single type entry in the baseline snapshot. Modified to add trait_impls field (D3 bundle) for capturing trait impl snapshots at baseline time.

type_definitions.name: TypeBaseline
type_definitions.description: Snapshot of the TypeGraph at /track:type-design time. Modified to add functions map (D4 bundle) for capturing free function snapshots.

type_definitions.name: FunctionNode
type_definitions.description: A public free function in the crate, as indexed for TDDD evaluation. New type added to TypeGraph::functions map (D4). Holds params / returns / is_async / module_path.

type_definitions.name: FunctionBaselineEntry
type_definitions.description: A single free function entry in the baseline snapshot. New type added to TypeBaseline::functions map (D4 bundle). Mirrors FunctionNode with string key for JSON serialization.

type_definitions.name: TraitImplBaselineEntry
type_definitions.description: A single trait impl entry in the baseline snapshot. New type added to TypeBaselineEntry::trait_impls (D3 bundle). Holds trait_name and origin_crate for workspace-origin filtering in baseline diff.

type_definitions.name: FunctionInfo
type_definitions.description: Information about a public function or method, as extracted from rustdoc JSON. Modified in T006 (S4): adds module_path field + module_path() accessor + with_module_path() constructor for free-function disambiguation. Used by build_type_graph to populate FunctionNode::module_path.

type_definitions.name: SchemaExport
type_definitions.description: Top-level export result containing all public API elements of a crate. Modified in T006 (S4): adds trait_origins: HashMap<String, String> field + trait_origins() accessor + with_trait_origins() constructor. Used by build_type_graph to populate TraitImplEntry::origin_crate for workspace-origin reverse check filtering.

type_definitions.name: TypeCatalogueDocument
type_definitions.description: Aggregate root for a layer's type catalogue. Referenced for Contract Map rendering and signal evaluation orchestration.

type_definitions.name: ContractMapRenderOptions
type_definitions.description: Options controlling Contract Map rendering (kind_filter, layers, etc.). Referenced — modified by contract map edge extension (IN-11) but struct shape unchanged.

type_definitions.name: MemberDeclaration
type_definitions.description: A member of a composite type: either an enum variant (name only) or a struct field (name + type string). Referenced — used in expected_members declarations.

type_definitions.name: MethodDeclaration
type_definitions.description: A structured method signature at L1 resolution. Referenced — used in expected_methods declarations for SecondaryPort / ApplicationService.

type_definitions.name: TypeCatalogueEntry
type_definitions.description: A single entry in the type catalogue. Referenced — gains expected_members / declares_application_service fields after schema extension (IN-01 / IN-03).

type_definitions.name: TypeAction
type_definitions.description: Declares the intended operation for a type catalogue entry: Add / Modify / Reference / Delete. Referenced — signal semantics extended per ADR §S.

type_definitions.name: TypestateTransitions
type_definitions.description: Declared transitions for a typestate type. Terminal or To(targets). Referenced.

type_definitions.name: ConsistencyReport
type_definitions.description: Result of a bidirectional consistency check between the type catalogue (spec) and the crate's public API (code), with baseline-aware filtering. Modified in T008 (D4 bundle): adds baseline_red_functions field (free functions with signature changes or deletions, group 3 Red) and undeclared_functions field (free functions not in declarations or baseline, group 4). Private fields, public getters.
